product_information.product_name: Hugo Boss Hugo Man eau de toilette 125 ML
product_information.description: Een frisse, subtiele geur met noten van o.a. groene appel, munt, lavendel, ceder en spar.

inferred_information.raw_ingredients: ALCOHOL DENAT, AQUA/(WATER), PARFUM(FRAGRANCE), ETHYLHEXYL,  METHOXYCINNAMATE, DIETHYLAMINO HYDROXYBENZOYL , HEXYL BENZOATE, BHT, LIMONENE, BENZYL SALICYLATE, LINLOOL, ALPHA-ISOMETHYL, IONONE, EUGENOL, CITRAL, ISOEUGENOL, CITRONELLOL, GERANIOL, BENZYL ALCOHOL, CI 60730 (EXT. VIOLET 2), CI 42090 (BLUE 1), CI 19140 (YELLOW 5).
